channel.title: hardware on Thiago Cardoso
channel.description: Recent content in hardware on Thiago Cardoso

item.title: Padoca: hotkey keyboard
item.description: Online meetings became widespread during the 2020 COVID pandemic. Call etiquette mandates that you keep your microphone muted while not talking, as almost everyone knows. This mute-unmute dynamic inspired me to search for a more comfortable solution that didn’t involve pressing multiple keys on the keyboard or reaching for the mouse every time. Luckily I stumbled upon this Instructable by FabroLabs Technologies . I decided to give it a try and build a hotkey keyboard from scratch: the casing, circuit, firmware, and keycaps.
